title: Non-technical summaries and retrospective assessments
body: "In November 2024, the Animals in Science Committee (ASC) was asked to give advice on how to improve the content of non-technical summaries (NTS) and retrospective assessments (RA), to make them clearer, more transparent, and better aligned with the Animals (Scientific Procedures) Act 1986 (ASPA).  The associated report and advice, in the form of a series of recommendations to the Regulator, applicants, and establishments, are reviewed and agreed by the full ASC.   We are aware of accessibility issues with these publications. We are working to fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy  "
